narrative:
Broadview Heights City has 15,392 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.0%, a modest Republican lean of 2.6 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +2.6% D−R vs -8.3% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
